# kSecClassCertificate

**Global Variable**

The value that indicates a certificate item.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecClassCertificate: CFString
```

## Discussion

The following keychain item attributes form the composite primary key of a certificate password item:

- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrAccessGroup] (on macOS, this key only applies if you set [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecUseDataProtectionKeychain] or [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrSynchronizable] to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true])
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrCertificateType]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrIssuer]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrSerialNumber]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrSynchronizable] (on iOS 14 and newer, iOS 11 newer, and watchOS 7 and newer)

Calls to [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemAdd(_:_:)] that add a certificate item with the same values for all of these attributes as an existing item result in [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/errSecDuplicateItem].

The following keychain item attributes apply to a certificate item, and don’t form part of its composite primary key:

- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrAccess] (macOS only)
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrAccessible] (on macOS, this key only applies if you set [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecUseDataProtectionKeychain] or [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrSynchronizable] to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true])
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrCertificateEncoding]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrLabel]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrSubject]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrSubjectKeyID]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrPublicKeyHash]
